idf_component_register(
    SRCS
        frontend.c
        frontend_util.c
        window.c
        window_util.c
        filterbank.c
        filterbank_util.c
        fft.cc
        fft_util.cc
        kiss_fft_int16.cc
        noise_reduction.c
        noise_reduction_util.c
        pcan_gain_control.c
        pcan_gain_control_util.c
        log_scale.c
        log_scale_util.c
        log_lut.c
    INCLUDE_DIRS "include" "kissfft"
)
